steps.description: For the R (red) view, toggle on "slice visibility in 3D view".

steps.description: For the R (red) view, toggle on "FOV, Spacing match 2D" (adjusts slice resolution to match the 2D viewport pixel spacing).

sub_operations.description: Toggle FOV spacing match 2D for Red view

ui_guidance.title: Toggle FOV, Spacing match 2D for R view

operation_descriptions: Toggle FOV spacing match 2D for Red view

steps.description: In the toolbar, turn on "slice intersection visibility". In the slice intersection interaction options, turn on "set interaction", then enable both "Translate" and "Rotate".

sub_operations.description: Enable slice intersection visibility and interaction modes (Translate, Rotate)

operation_descriptions: Enable slice intersection visibility and interaction modes (Translate, Rotate)

steps.description: Manually adjust the slice intersection position by translate and rotate of the cross lines in each view.

sub_operations.description: Manually adjust slice intersection position by translating and rotating cross lines

ui_guidance.title: Adjust slice intersection
ui_guidance.instruction: Adjust the cross lines in each view.

steps.description: Click the "Add mandibular curve" button.

sub_operations.description: Add mandibular curve

steps.description: Configure the display settings of the mandibular curve created by the "Add mandibular curve" button so it is shown in both "View 1" and "Red".

sub_operations.description: Configure display of mandibular curve for View 1 and Red view

operation_descriptions: Configure display of mandibular curve for View 1 and Red view

destructive_ops_contract.reason: Display node view restrictions are cleared before assigning explicit view IDs.

steps.description: Manually click and draw on the "Red" view to create a curve along the mandible.

sub_operations.description: Draw mandibular curve on Red view by placing control points
sub_operations.placement_instructions: Click along the mandible in the Red view to place curve control points

steps.placement_instructions: Click along the mandible in the Red view to place curve control points

steps.description: Change the layout to "BoneReconstructionPlanner".

sub_operations.description: Change layout to BoneReconstructionPlanner

api_chains:
'    <layout type="vertical">
    <item>
      <layout type="horizontal">
      <item>
        <view class="vtkMRMLViewNode" singletontag="{mandibleTag}">
        <property name="viewlabel" action="default">1</property>
        </view>
      </item>
      <item>
        <view class="vtkMRMLSliceNode" singletontag="Red">
        <property name="orientation" action="default">Axial</property>
        <property name="viewlabel" action="default">R</property>
        <property name="viewcolor" action="default">#F34A33</property>
        </view>
      </item>
      </layout>
    </item>
    <item>
      <view class="vtkMRMLViewNode" singletontag="{fibulaTag}">
      <property name="viewlabel" action="default">2</property>
      </view>
    </item>
    </layout>'.format

steps.description: For the R (red) view, toggle off "slice visibility in 3D view".

sub_operations.description: Toggle off slice visibility in 3D view for Red view

ui_guidance.title: Hide slice in 3D for R view

operation_descriptions: Toggle off slice visibility in 3D view for Red view

steps.description: Manually set how many cut planes you want.

steps.description: Click "Add cut plane" button.

sub_operations.description: Add a mandibular cut plane

steps.description: Place one mandibular cut plane using the extension's Add cut plane workflow. If the user requested N cut planes, repeat the Add cut plane + place plane interaction N times. Do not store these planes as a rotation plane; they are mandibular cut planes managed by the extension.

sub_operations.description: Place mandibular cut plane by clicking in the view
sub_operations.placement_instructions: Place this plane, then click Done.

steps.placement_instructions: Place this plane, then click Done.

steps.description: Click "Add fibula line" button.

sub_operations.description: Add fibula line

steps.description: Draw a line over the fibula in "3D View 2", starting with the first point distally and the last point proximally.

sub_operations.description: Draw fibula line by placing control points in 3D View 2
sub_operations.placement_instructions: Place first point distally, last point proximally on the fibula in 3D View 2

steps.placement_instructions: Place first point distally, last point proximally on the fibula in 3D View 2

steps.description: Click "Center fibula line using fibula model" button to align the line with the anatomical axis of the fibula.

controller.prompt: Is the reconstruction satisfactory? (yes to exit loop, no to continue)

ui_guidance.instruction: Adjust the plane position and orientation.

steps.description: Click "Update fibula planes over fibula line; update fibula bone pieces and transform them to mandible" to regenerate the reconstruction. Review the result; if it is not satisfactory, repeat steps 27-30 until the reconstruction is satisfactory.

sub_operations.description: Regenerate fibula planes and transformation (update after adjustments)

controller.prompt: Is the reconstruction satisfactory? (yes to exit loop, no to continue)

steps.description: When the reconstruction is satisfactory, in the BoneReconstructionPlanner module's "Mandible planes" row, toggle off the eye-icon tool button to hide the mandibular cut planes.

sub_operations.description: Hide mandibular cut planes (eye icon off)

steps.description: Clear the "Show original mandible model" checkbox.
